title: hortensia serrata var. angustata
intro: Hortensia serrata var. angustata, also known as Japanese blue mistletoe, is a plant species with white flowers and small, oval-shaped leaves. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Hortensia serrata var. angustata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
